title: Lupin the 3rd: The Last Job
titleNative: ルパン三世 The Last Job
synonyms: LUPIN THE THIRD the Last Job
synopsis: Has the intrepid Inspector Zenigata bitten the final bullet? In the chaos following Lupin’s heist of a Buddha avatar statuette, Inspector Zenigata is mortally wounded in pursuit of the master thief. But Lupin’s not to blame; the maniacal supervillain Morgana intervened, swiping the Buddha figure, and sending “Pops” to his fate. Morgana is after the ancient power of the Fuma called Fujin, with the beautiful ninja Asuka also racing to find the secret to Fujin, but Fujiko Mine keeps reaching her hand into the pie and causing even more complications. What is Fujin, and who will wield its secret power? (Source: Discotek Media)

title: City Hunter: The Secret Service
titleNative: シティーハンタースペシャル ザ・シークレット・サービス
synonyms: ซิตี้ฮันเตอร์ ปฏิบัติการสายลับ
Thợ Săn Thành Phố: Dịch Vụ Bí Mật
synopsis: James McGuire has a dream. He wants to become the president of Guinam and free his people from the military rulers who have been in power up until now. However, one thing stands in McGuire's way: his past. And it's beginning to catch up with him, endangering not only his career, but the life of his long lost daughter. McGuire hires the City Hunter, Ryo Saeba and his partner Kaori to protect his daughter Anna, who herself is a Secret Service agent assigned to bodyguard the presidential hopeful.

title: Gudetama
synopsis: Gudetama, an egg that is dead to the world and completely lacks motivation. No matter what cooking method you use, Gudetama remains unmoved.

title: Princess Resurrection Special
synopsis: Flandre has gone missing within the mansion and Reiri, Riza, Hiro, and Hime have been left without any of their powers. They quickly deduce they’re in a nightmare after exposing an illusion by setting a curtain ablaze. They have to work to find their way out of the nightmare while facing tough opponents. (Source: Wikipedia, edited)

title: Lupin the 3rd: From Siberia with Love
titleRomaji: Lupin III: Russia yori Ai wo Komete
titleEnglish: Lupin the 3rd: From Siberia with Love
titleNative: ルパン三世『ロシアより愛をこめて』
synonyms: Lupin Sansei: Russia Yori Ai o Komete
Lupin III: From Russia With Love
Lupin III- Il tesoro degli zar
synopsis: Ultimate thief Lupin the Third has a new target: the lost gold of the Romanov dynasty! With the help of a mysterious blonde named Judy Scott, Lupin discovers the treasure hidden in Texas, at the Bank of Liberty. His partners Jigen and Fujiko lend a hand in harvesting the gold, but a few snags happen along the way. Not only does the New York Mafia own the gold, but Rasputon - the telepathic descendant of the mad monk Rasputin - wants it for himself! With Rasputon manipulating the world's leaders and even a certain samurai, the stage is set for the battle over the Romanovs' golden legacy! (Source: Discotek Media)

title: Kantoku Fuyuki Todoki
synopsis: This is the anime adaptation of Kantoku Fuyuki Todoki (Insufficient Direction), the first essay manga by the "queen of the manga world," Moyoco Anno. The comedic and heartwarming autobiographical story follows her everyday married "otaku lifestyle" with Hideaki Anno, "the founder of the otaku cult." (Source: Anime News Network)

title: That is the Bottleneck
synonyms: Ahí está el cuello de botella
synopsis: The employees at the Hot Hot Mart may seem a bit ordinary and mundane. From slightly unproductive chatter and everyone’s obsession with technology, to the laziness of the store manager, is everyone okay...? But everything isn’t as it seems—especially with Muto, the mysterious worker whose face is concealed and is followed by an ominous cat. Get ready to see what happens before the next shift! (Source: Funimation)

title: Pokémon: Pikachu's Island Adventure
titleNative: ピカチュウのわんぱくアイランド
synopsis: Pikachu and the other Pokémon were at the beach, when a weakened Wynaut approaches them. It tells them that its friends were attacked by Meowth and the other Team Rocket Pokémon, as well as an Exploud and a Hariyama, because Meowth wanted to take over their playground, which resides on a nearby island. After hearing Wynaut's story, Pikachu and the others decide to help them take back their playground, and begin to train them, so that they can rescue their island from the clutches of Meowth. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Meitantei Conan: Hiiro no Fuzai Shoumei
titleRomaji: Meitantei Conan: Hiiro no Fuzai Shoumei
titleNative: 名探偵コナン 緋色の不在証明
synopsis: The Akai family, is a dangerous family shrouded in mystery, with members of the family entangled in various intrigues. Centering around Shuuichi Akai, who was thought to be dead at the Raiha pass, this movie gets up-close with the personalities and perspectives of Masumi Sera, Shukichi Haneda, and Mary, which have been revealed in bits and pieces so far, and unravels their relationship. The climax of the "Scarlet" series ends with the splendid come-back of Shuuichi Akai at the Raiha pass. A prologue to a certain incident shows that Toru Amuro aka Bourbon, Shuuichi Akai's rival, gets "clues" from the FBI. Toru Amuro intensively investigates the relationship between Shuuichi Akai and Subaru Okiya. Akai's return at the end of the unparalleled battle between wits and intellect has shocked all viewers. To add to that, the truth behind the "Alibi play" series reveals that Conan played a part in it. The Akai family is an integral part of the "Detective Conan" series. This compilation will tho
